task.title: Phase 1: file-based task briefs in delegate_task

messages.content:
DONE: task_file param added to delegate_task.

Files changed:
- `src/mcp-server.ts`: Added `task_file?: boolean` to `delegate_task` inputSchema. Handler: when true, calls `startActivity(null)` to get an activityId, writes brief to `.synapse/tasks/<activityId>.md`, sends a short pointer message to the worker. Normal path unchanged.
- `.synapse/SYNAPSE-orchestrator.md`: Added note after step 1 explaining `task_file: true`, when to use it, and the worker instruction to `Read` the file.
- `.gitignore`: `.synapse/` already covers task files â€” no change needed.

Build: `tsc` clean.
delegate_task now supports task_file:true â€” large specs written to .synapse/tasks/<id>.md
